data.raceComments: {"comment":"A very even sprint over 1200m for BM70 performers is for 80K, and the resuming 4. EPIMELES has lit up the jump-outs. recently scoring by a wide margin on the Heath course here late last month. He did not come up in the spring, and he will be resuming as a gelding. Now that his mind is on the job, he can live up to his earlier promise. On top. 12. KING TUT won fresh up on the Heath course here early last month, and then flashed home too late when finishing runner-up by a head at this level on the Sandown-Lakeside course 17 days ago. Stick with him. 2. KA YING CHEER has been a revelation since returning from Hong Kong, winning all 3 starts since resuming at Pakenham in February. He beat a stronger field here 3 weeks ago by a nose, and after a 3kg claim, he is not too badly treated at the weights for this softer assignment. He can continue on his winning way in this as well. 6. WOLFY has a big finish on him when the breaks go his way. He is peaking at the right time and can win this.","runners":[4,12,2,6],"exclusive":true}
